## Summary

A one-sentence description of the feature.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution

How should it work from the user's perspective? Include example code or config if relevant.

```python

```

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about, and why you ruled them out.

## Component

Which layer would this change?

- [ ] Tether (policy gate / OPA evaluation)
- [ ] Anchor (HITL queue / credentials)
- [ ] Sandbox (container isolation)
- [ ] Memory (provenance store)
- [ ] Gateway (MCP gateway server)
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] Adapters (`@governed`, OpenAI, LangChain)
- [ ] Policies (Rego rules)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Additional context

Links to related issues, prior art, or relevant research.
